name: Persistent Memory
description: Persistent memory with advanced filtering — store and retrieve entries by tags, entities, date range, or free text

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Save a memory entry with optional tags and auto-detected entities

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List all memory entries (paginated), no filters required

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search memory entries by tags, entity, date range, or free text

tools.name: memory_update
tools.description: Update content and/or tags of an existing memory entry by ID

tools.name: memory_delete
tools.description: Delete a memory entry by ID

tools.name: memory_list_tags
tools.description: List all tags and entities in use with counts

tools.name: memory_export
tools.description: Export all memory entries to JSON for backup or migration

tools.name: memory_import
tools.description: Import memory entries from a previously exported JSON blob

tools.name: memory_relate
tools.description: Create an explicit relationship between two memory entries (requires enableAssociativeMode)

tools.name: memory_find_connections
tools.description: Find entries connected to a given entry via explicit relationships (requires enableAssociativeMode)
